title: Milwaukee Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is hitting Milwaukee with a Z-Score of -3.80. The city is experiencing extremely cold temperatures, with a Score of 10.0/10, classified as CRITICAL.
body:
The current weather conditions in Milwaukee are characterized by a high level of cold, with 14.3 GG of Heating Degree Days (HDD) and no Cooling Degree Days (CDD). 
 The relative humidity is at 58% and the wind speed is moderate at 7.6 km/h. 
 The cold snap is expected to continue, with significant impacts on various sectors.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
